images.copyright: Lightning storm over saguaro cacti, Sonoran Desert, Arizona (© Jack Dykinga/Nature Picture Library)
images.title: Guided by the weather
images.caption: World Meteorological Day
images.desc: The strength of nature is nowhere more evident than in powerful storms. Scary? Yes. Fascinating? Even more so. Learning to understand and respect these forces helps humanity live more safely.
